chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 229 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 17.10.2025. Mr. Rashid Raees, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Irfan Ahmed Qureshi, Advocate for proposed accused. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. = The applicant Muhammad Hanif is aggrieved by the order passed by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Hyderabad, dismissing his criminal miscellaneous application. He contends that the proposed accused Aqeel Ahmed who was Respondent No.2 in a Revision matter has allegedly played mischief, cheated, committed forgery and also affirmed an affidavit knowingly that it was false. Consequently, the criminal actions led to the dismissal of the Revision Application as when the proposed accused filed urgent application signed by him (and not by his Counsel) alongwith alleged false affidavit and got the matter listed for the next date, the real applicant had no knowledge about the date of hearing hence the Revision Application was dismissed for non-prosecution. During the course of submissions before me today when I asked for further information in order to adjudicate this matter, it emerged that the applicant had attempted to restore the Revision Application which exercise is currently pending before the Honourable Supreme Court of Pakistan. Therefore, the record of the Civil Revision Application No.204 of 2016 is no longer available with the High Court Hyderabad Circuit but is with the Supreme Court. This matter is adjourned sine-die until the decision of Supreme Court and when the Revision file returns back to this Court so that the matter may be decided.

Therefore, the record of the Civil Revision Application No.204 of 2016 is no longer available with the High Court Hyderabad Circuit but is with the Supreme Court. This matter is adjourned sine-die until the decision of Supreme Court and when the Revision file returns back to this Court so that the matter may be decided. Meanwhile, the counsel for the proposed accused / respondents claims copy of this Criminal Miscellaneous Application and waives notice and has also filed certified true copies of two orders passed by this Court dated 08.01.2024 and 19.05.2025 in Civil Revision Application No.204/2016, which are taken on record. JUDGE Tufail
